### Important Tips:
* Change compiler to **XeLaTeX**. (On Overleaf, via `File` > `Settings`)
* Do not edit `environments.sty` or `requirements.sty` unless adding custom macros.
* Do not edit `main.tex`, expect to remove the reference instructions located between **lines 66-88**.
* A template walkthrough will be provided at the **LaTeX workshop** during the mid-term viva week. Attendance is highly encouraged.
* If you are a complete beginner, here is a 30-min tutorial to learn LaTeX: https://www.overleaf.com/learn/latex/Learn_LaTeX_in_30_minutes
